title: Spicy Spanish Stir-Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy Mexican-inspired stir-fry dish, perfect for adventurous eaters.
instructions: 1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the diced ancho chili and cook until tender.
3. Add the diced tomato and cook until tender.
4. Stir in the spicy stir-fry sauce and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Garnish with additional diced tomato if desired.
8. Serve with tortillas or rice for a complete meal.
9. Refrigerate leftovers for up to 3 days.
